'''Drezzel''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] in command of the Imperial outpost on [[Seoul 5]] just after [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. An Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] dispatched Drezzel and a sizable landing force to the formerly lost [[Planet/Legends|world]], home to an ancient and legendary [[Human/Legends|Human]] civilization, in order to search for valuable treasures. There they found a cache of extremely valuable [[Seoularian crystal]]s, and assigned scientists [[Ualp Xathan]] and [[Fem Nu-Ar]] to study the find. However, they were soon joined by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], representatives of the new [[Alliance of Free Planets]], inveterate fortune-seekers who had themselves come searching for plunder. Drezzel dispatched his personal adjutant, the [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] [[Feline/Legends|feline]] [[Ssssk!]], to hunt down the newcomers, but he was unable to prevent Solo from overloading the city's [[crystal control room]] and causing a massive explosion that destroyed the entire city.<ref name="marvel84" />
